'''Taieb''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Artisan/Legends|artisan]] who lived in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. As a gift, he crafted a small [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] helmet for [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].
